holdings.infoBox: VTHR is an equity ETF with a total of 2925 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.81%, Apple at 6.19%, Microsoft at 4.60%, Amazon.com at 3.58%, and Alphabet at 3.05%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Russell 3000 ETF (VTHR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 3000 indexThe fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index that measures the investable US equity space, covering the entire market-cap spectrum including micro-caps. VTHR was launched on Sep 20, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.
